visual.name: proTrendLineVisual
visual.description: Professional trend-line chart for Power BI. Compares planned vs actual hourly units over time with full statistical analysis: variance bands, reference lines (avg/max/min/median/target), regression trend lines, anomaly detection, linear forecast with confidence bands, KPI summary cards, conditional formatting, crosshair interaction, and mini sparkline panel.

dataRoles.name: timeAxis
dataRoles.description: Date or time field for the X-axis

dataRoles.name: plannedValues
dataRoles.description: Planned or estimated hourly units (target values)

dataRoles.name: remainingValues
dataRoles.description: Remaining units per period for forecast basis

dataRoles.name: tooltips
dataRoles.description: Additional measures shown in the tooltip
